# Copilot Repository Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` first. It is the project overview and navigation entry.

Rules:

- Prefer current source, build scripts, CI, and tests over older documents.
- When facts are uncertain, mark them with `<!-- 待确认 -->`.
- Read the relevant `.ai/instructions/*.md` file before editing.
- Keep adapter files thin; full rules live under `.ai/`.
- After meaningful project changes, update `MEMORY.md`.
- Use Chinese for project-facing documentation unless the target file is English-only.
